summary: 0.6.42 updates the transport seam so the default skip or scrub step is 15 seconds and explicit seeks outside the active A-B range clear A-B instead of being remapped through that range.
operatorSignals: Default scrub or skip movement still felt too jumpy in the current control flow.
Manual slider interaction outside the active A-B window should cancel A-B instead of silently forcing the seek back inside the loop.
actionsTaken: Raised the default skip or scrub step to 15 seconds.
Changed explicit seek handling so targets outside the active A-B range clear and disable A-B before the seek is applied.
nonGoals: No slideshow or right-stick volume changes.
